---
name: wonder-reuse-generate-output
description: Render a reusable asset into concrete output.
---

# Generate Output

Render a reusable asset into concrete output.

## Procedure

scope

- Determine the requested output.
- Determine whether output should be returned to the user or written to a file.
- Treat file writing as unsafe unless the target path is explicit or confirmed.

select

- Use an explicit asset id when provided.
- Otherwise match tags, appliesTo, description, and variables.
- Use one clear candidate automatically.
- Ask the user when multiple plausible candidates exist.

resolve-variables

- Fill provided values.
- Infer safe values from request and context.
- Ask for required values when inference is uncertain.
- Apply defaults for optional values when available.

render

- Render `body.md` using simple `{{variableName}}` replacement.
- Block rendering when a required variable is missing.
- Treat unknown variables in the body as validation warnings.
- Write generated LF-normalized output to `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/output.md`.

deliver

- Return output to the user by default.
- Write a target file only when the target path is explicit or confirmed.
- Overwrite existing files only with explicit confirmation.
- Insert into an existing section only when the insertion point is clear.

report

- Write `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/selected-asset.json`.
- Write `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/variables.json`.
- Write `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/artifacts.json` with written paths.
- Report selected asset, variables, delivery mode, written paths, and unresolved optional values.

Do not modify asset definitions.
Do not promote generated output into a reusable asset.
Do not maintain a latest report file.
Do not modify other plugin config files.
